examples.title: Hello World Program
examples.description: Basic C++ program demonstrating the general form with output
examples.explanation: This demonstrates the complete basic structure: preprocessor directive, namespace, main function, cout for output, and return statement.

examples.title: Input-Output Program
examples.description: Program demonstrating both input and output operations
examples.explanation: Shows cin for reading input from keyboard and cout for displaying output. cin uses >> (extraction) to pull data in, cout uses << (insertion) to push data out.

examples.title: Program without using namespace
examples.description: Alternative style using scope resolution operator instead of using namespace
examples.explanation: Demonstrates using std:: prefix instead of 'using namespace std'. This is considered better practice as it avoids potential naming conflicts.
